_comment: Public template documenting the familiarity / baseline store shape. The real file (diting-familiarity.json) is accrued automatically as diting runs and is git-ignored — it holds real BSSIDs / MACs / BLE manufacturer payloads and must never be committed. Do not fill this in by hand; it is machine-maintained. Top-level keys are stable per-entity identities: ble:<manufacturer_hex> (or ble:vn:<vendor_id>/<name> when no usable payload), ap:<bssid>, lan:<mac>, bonjour:<service_type/name>. Override the location via DITING_FAMILIARITY_STORE.
